docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-20-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VICTOR JIMENEZ-ESPINOZA IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT, REPRESENTED BY CCSF CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE, GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF VICTOR JIMENEZ-ESPINOZA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR CCSF IS PRESENT. **THE COURT DENIES THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS DUE TO FAILURE TO ADHEAR TO THE CITY'S PROTOCOL FOR SUBMITTING A CLAIM.** PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS SENT TO THE COURT FROM PRISONER LEGAL SERVICE RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-16-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ-ESPINOZA, VICTOR / SFSO PLS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ-ESPINOZA, VICTOR / SFSO PLS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT SOME ITEMS FROM 12/25/24 ARREST ARE STILL IN CUSTODY OF SFPD, BUT OTHER ITEMS WERE LEFT AT THE SCENE OF ARREST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 REMARKS: THE SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE LOCATION DOES NOT ACCEPT LEGAL PAPERWORK. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ-ESPINOZA, VICTOR / SFSO PLS AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT
